highlights.title: OpenAI Accuses Musk of ‘Ambush’ as $100 Billion-Plus Trial Looms
highlights.description: OpenAI says Elon Musk has suddenly changed direction on what he’s seeking in his lawsuit against the startup in a “legal ambush” just weeks before trial.

highlights.title: OpenAI says to update Mac apps including ChatGPT and Codex as security precaution
highlights.description:
OpenAI is asking users of its Mac software to update to the latest releases from today “out of an abundance of caution.” This is due to a security issue with a third-party developer tool, Axios, that was used by OpenAI.
more…

highlights.title: Apple Hires Uber’s Asia-Pacific Government Relations Chief
highlights.description: Apple Inc. has hired Uber Technologies Inc.’s head of public policy and government relations for Asia-Pacific as it looks to revamp its supply chains in the region.

highlights.title: Four astronauts are back home after a daring ride around the Moon
highlights.description: "I can't imagine a better crew that just completed a perfect mission right now."

highlights.title: App Store fight continues as Apple and Epic clash over court-ordered stay
highlights.description:
Apple and Epic have filed new requests over whether the court should keep or lift a recent stay in their ongoing App Store legal battle. Here are the details.
more…

highlights.title: Japan Bets $16 Billion to Propel Startup Rapidus Into AI Chips
highlights.description: Japan approved ¥631.5 billion ($4 billion) in additional subsidies to quicken Rapidus Corp. into the intensely competitive AI chipmaking arena, ramping up financial support for a signature project widely regarded as a long shot.
